discussion_comments.comment_body: With 19 ending it's LTS in 3 months, maybe the PR could aim to support angular 20 and up instead 🤔

discussion_comments.comment_body:
New setting in v19

```suggestion
    "strictStandalone": true,
    "strictTemplates": true
```

I updated the other examples to Angular 19.1 pre-release and TS 5.7

```suggestion
  "dependencies": {
    "@angular/common": "^19.1.0-next.0",
    "@angular/compiler": "^19.1.0-next.0",
    "@angular/core": "^19.1.0-next.0",
    "@angular/platform-browser": "^19.1.0-next.0",
    "@angular/platform-browser-dynamic": "^19.1.0-next.0",
    "@tanstack/angular-query-experimental": "^5.62.0",
    "rxjs": "^7.8.1",
    "tslib": "^2.6.3",
    "zone.js": "^0.15.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@angular/build": "^19.0.2",
    "@angular/cli": "^19.0.2",
    "@angular/compiler-cli": "^19.1.0-next.0",
    "typescript": "5.7.2"
  }
```
